message:
test(sync): add comprehensive unit tests for path filtering and file plan builder

Expand sync test coverage with deterministic verification:

Path filtering tests:
- deny_env_files: .env, .env.local, .env.production blocked
- deny_credential_files: credentials.json, tokens.json blocked
- deny_ssh_and_crypto_keys: id_rsa, id_ed25519, *.pem blocked
- deny_extra_patterns: user-supplied deny patterns applied correctly
- allow_normal_config_files: config.toml, settings.yaml pass through
- allow_list_empty_allows_all: no allow list = no filtering
- allow_list_filters: only allowed paths pass
- allow_glob_style_prefix: glob-style allow patterns work

File plan builder tests:
- file_plan_new_file_is_add: new files classified as Add
- file_plan_same_content_is_skip: unchanged files skipped via SHA-256
- file_plan_different_content_without_overwrite_is_conflict: conflicts
  detected when overwrite disabled
- file_plan_different_content_with_overwrite_is_update: updates allowed
  when overwrite enabled
- file_plan_denied_files_are_excluded: deny list applied during planning
- file_plan_sorted_deterministically: plan output is path-sorted for
  reproducible execution order

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
